summary: Updated pi-move to participate in the same superseded/deletion-candidate marking model as pi-relocate without deleting source sessions. Added canonical store upserts after each repo_move manifest append: source/destination sessions and observations, repo_move edge, and source observation_marks for superseded and deletion_candidate with manual_review_required=1 pointing to the destination observation. Filed/closed pm-zlvv, validated with npm run lint, committed/pushed a669eb5 'Mark repo move sources superseded', and verified clean jj/git state.
